page_content:
Formerly: MUSC699N.

MUSC658 Seminar in Advanced Analysis (3 Credits)

Individual analytical projects including computer music, non-western music and advanced Schenkerian analysis. Readings regarding form, structure and analytical methods.

Prerequisite: MUSC651, MUSC451, and MUSC471; or permission of ARHU-School of Music department.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

MUSC659 Seminar in Repertoire and Pedagogy (2-3 Credits) Analysis and preparation of choral master works from all major style periods for the purpose of successful rehearsal and performance by conductors.

Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Credit Only Granted for. MUSC659 or MUSC699R.
